briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ leading at +1.5%, favouring growth and momentum names. With only $577 in cash I can open one more position — SOFI scores 95, sits in the ideal RSI momentum zone (61.1), and fintech typically outperforms on strong tape days. All six existing positions remain within their stop/target bands so no sells are needed.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-on' session is when investors feel confident and move money into higher-risk assets like growth stocks, small caps, and tech, expecting gains to outweigh potential losses. Today's NASDAQ +1.5% move is a textbook example — when fear is low and optimism is high, capital flows away from safe havens (bonds, utilities) and into momentum names. As a portfolio manager, risk-on days are when holding quality momentum picks pays off most.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指當投資者信心充足時，將資金轉移至較高風險資產的市場狀態，例如成長股、小型股及科技股，預期回報將超越潛在損失。今日納斯達克大漲1.5%正是典型的風險偏好行情——當市場恐慌情緒低落、樂觀預期主導時，資金便從避險資產（如債券、公用事業股）流向動能型股票。對投資組合管理者而言，風險偏好日正是持有優質動能股最能發揮效益的時機。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on Monday with the NASDAQ surging 1.5% and the S&P 500 adding 0.9%, driven by renewed risk appetite as investors rotated back into growth and technology shares. Semiconductor and space-tech names led the advance, reflecting confidence that AI spending cycles remain intact and that near-term rate pressures are contained. The risk-on tone encouraged broad participation across small- and mid-cap momentum stocks, which outpaced defensive sectors.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市周一全面上揚，納斯達克指數大漲1.5%，標普500指數亦上升0.9%，市場風險偏好明顯回升，資金重新流入成長股及科技板塊。半導體及太空科技類股領漲，反映投資者對AI資本支出周期持續的信心，以及對短期利率壓力趨緩的樂觀預期。整體市場情緒積極，中小型動能股的升幅普遍跑贏防守性板塊。

trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 61.1 still has meaningful upside runway in a risk-on session; fintech names benefit directly from risk appetite, and this deploys idle cash above the $500 threshold.
